contract_claim: Comment says 'If ping doesn't work, try listing containers' but since `docker ping` is not a real Docker command, the ping will never succeed. The comment implies the fallback is conditional, but in practice it is always reached.
observed_behavior: Comment says 'If ping doesn't work, try listing containers' but since `docker ping` is not a real Docker command, the ping will never succeed. The comment implies the fallback is conditional, but in practice it is always reached.
